name: UserRating
description: This object describes the rating of a user based on their Telegram Star spendings.

rows.description: Current level of the user, indicating their reliability when purchasing digital goods and services. A higher level suggests a more trustworthy customer; a negative level is likely reason for concern.
Numerical value of the user's rating; the higher the rating, the better
The rating value required to get the current level
Optional . The rating value required to get to the next level; omitted if the maximum level was reached
